title: taraxacum extimum
intro: Taraxacum extimum, also known as the common dandelion, is a perennial plant with bright yellow flowers and jagged, toothed leaves. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum extimum include its high content of vitamins A, C, and K, as well as its rich levels of minerals such as potassium, iron, and zinc. The health benefits of consuming Taraxacum extimum include its ability to support liver function, lower blood pressure, and improve digestion, making it a popular herb for treating various ailments. Taraxacum extimum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, tincture, and capsules, allowing for its medicinal properties to be easily incorporated into a daily health routine.
